code: import React,{useEffect}from'react';import{useNavigate}from'react-router-dom';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Logout=()=>{const navigate=useNavigate();useEffect(()=>{localStorage.removeItem('access_token');localStorage.removeItem('refresh_token');alert('You have been logged out.');navigate('/login');},[navigate]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"Logging out..."});};export default Logout;
